target: Issue #24 (24-docs-drift-docsnotificationsmd-20); @kody run comment redirected work to MiniMax M3 vision support
reason: Added /minimax-m3/ to VISION_MODEL_PATTERNS in src/dashboard/lib/chat/vision-support.ts so MiniMax M3 attachments are sent as real image parts instead of inlined as text. Updated the file's header doc-comment to point at MiniMax M2.7 (still text-only) as the example. Extended tests/unit/chat/vision-support.spec.ts with M3 cases in visionModels and a whitespace/case assertion; M2 / M2.7 cases stay in textModels to lock in that older generations keep the inline fallback.
